scripts.test: node --import tsx components/services/stretto-opt/compatMatrix.test.ts && node --import tsx components/stretto/selectionPolicy.test.ts && node --import tsx components/stretto/searchProgressModel.test.ts && node --import tsx components/services/midiSpelling.test.ts && node --import tsx server/assemblyProxyCore.test.ts && node --import tsx components/services/strettoScoringRegression.ts
scripts.test:integration: node --import tsx components/services/strettoIntegrationTest.ts && node --import tsx components/services/strettoPairwiseLogicCheck.ts && node --import tsx components/services/strettoPrecomputeBackendRegression.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:heavy
scripts.test:stretto:dag: npm run test:stretto:dag:invariants && npm run test:stretto:dag:heavy
scripts.test:stretto:all: npm run test:stretto:scoring-regression && npm run test:stretto:pairwise-logic && npm run test:stretto:dag && npm run test:stretto:integration && npm run test:stretto:backend-regression && npm run test:stretto:performance-regression
